app.title: kui
tree.empty: No topics yet. Create one above.
tree.confirmDelete: Delete this topic and its descendants? Files will be removed too.
topic.placeholder: Ask the agent or paste material. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline.
topic.empty: Pick a topic on the left, or create a new one.
chat.searchCompleteNoText: Search completed but unable to generate a full response, please retry
chat.customRetrying: Component error, asking AI to fix (retry {{count}}/3)...
chat.customRenderFailed: Component failed after maximum retry attempts
chat.noModelConfigured: Please configure a model in Settings.
derive.title: Derive sub-topic
graph.tip: Drag nodes to rearrange. Drag from a node's right handle to another node to create a manual link (dashed).
settings.providers.empty: No providers yet. Click the top-right button to add.
settings.agents.name: Name
settings.agents.empty: No agents yet. Click the top-right button to add.
settings.language.label: Language
settings.search.autoDesc: Automatically try configured providers in priority order, fall back to AnySearch Free if all fail.
settings.search.tavilyDesc: Designed for AI agents, returns clean structured content. Best for English.
settings.search.serperDesc: Google search results, best for CJK content. 2500 free credits on signup.
settings.search.braveDesc: Independent search engine, privacy-friendly. 2000 free queries/month.
settings.search.anysearchDesc: Anonymous free search, no API key needed. Used as fallback.
profile.description: Profiles provide complete isolation of topics, messages, and tags for different contexts.
profile.confirmDelete: Delete this profile? All topics and messages within it will be permanently removed.
empty.slogan.1: A great question is the seed of every discovery.
empty.slogan.2: Every conversation is a journey of thought.
empty.slogan.4: Knowledge grows through accumulation and lives on in notes.
empty.slogan.5: A small thought today, a big insight tomorrow.
empty.slogan.6: Let ideas flow freely; let your notes remember everything.
empty.startHint: Start a conversation in the input below ↓
topic.noModelForTitle: Please configure a model to use AI title generation
interactive.lineChartMinPoints: Line chart requires at least 2 data points
topic.interactivePlaceholder: Ask the agent. The agent can interact with you through UI components. Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline.
onboarding.welcome.title: Welcome to KUI
onboarding.welcome.desc: KUI is an AI chat client designed for deep thinking. Let's spend a minute setting things up.
onboarding.model.title: Configure your first model
onboarding.model.desc: Add your preferred AI model provider. All information stays on your device.
onboarding.model.successDesc: Great! Your AI model is ready to use.
onboarding.agent.title: Set up your assistant
onboarding.agent.desc: Give your assistant a name and personality. The system prompt determines how it communicates with you.
onboarding.agent.promptPlaceholder: Describe the assistant's personality, style and guidelines...
onboarding.agent.atLeastOne: Please create at least one agent
onboarding.profile.title: Your profile
onboarding.profile.desc: Set your nickname and avatar to personalize your experience.
onboarding.tour.title: Discover KUI's features
onboarding.tour.desc: KUI offers unique features to help you think and explore more effectively.
onboarding.tour.treeDesc: All conversations are organized in a tree structure, clearly showing your thought flow.
onboarding.tour.subTitle: Sub-conversation derivation
onboarding.tour.subDesc: Branch off from any conversation node to dive deeper into specific topics without losing context.
onboarding.tour.interactiveDesc: AI can interact through cards, forms, selectors and more — conversations go beyond just text.
onboarding.tour.modesDesc: Work, life, study... Use different profiles for different contexts with complete isolation.
update.title: New Version Available
update.failed: Update failed, please try again later
